query_normalized: anyflow: any-step video diffusion model with on-policy flow map distillation computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as a foundational survey and canonical reference for the domain of video diffusion models, providing the essential architectural context, temporal dynamics, and state-of-the-art landscape that any literature review on a specific video diffusion variant (like AnyFlow) must cite.
